Sign inGet started
About

Built with care, in South Africa.

We believe matric is hard enough — the tools around it shouldn't make it harder. Aptiverse is what we wish we'd had ourselves.
Mission

From 'I am not enough' to 'I am capable and growing.'

We measure success by sustained growth and wellbeing — never just marks. Every product decision starts there.

Values

What we stand for

Growth, not ranking

We never compare students to each other. We compare you to past you.

Wellbeing first

If something would make a 16-year-old anxious, we don't ship it. Period.

Real access

Our free tier is genuinely useful. Bursary partnerships fund the rest.

Privacy by default

Diaries are private. Marks are guarded. POPIA-compliant from day zero.

South African context

IEB, NSC, NSFAS, four official languages. Built for here, not adapted.

Empathy, then engineering

Every feature begins with a real story from a real student.

aptiverse

The holistic student success partner — built for South African Grade 11 & 12 learners. Grow with confidence.

Made with care in South Africa.
